rules.name: csf_financial_disclaimer_required
rules.description: When content discusses investment, it must include a financial disclaimer referencing independent advice or the Birchal disclosure document. Content that does not mention investment is exempt.
rules.rationale: ASIC RG 234 requires balanced disclosure for equity crowdfunding campaigns. Content that mentions investment must include disclaimers, but pure product/brand content is exempt.

rules.name: no_guaranteed_returns
rules.description: Block any language promising or implying investment returns. No return projections permitted in CSF campaigns.
rules.rationale: ASIC RG 234 prohibits return projections in CSF campaigns. Any language implying guaranteed or expected returns is a regulatory breach.

rules.name: no_minimisation_of_investment_risk
rules.description: Block language that downplays or minimises startup or investment risk.
rules.rationale: ASIC RG 234 requires balanced presentation of risks and benefits. Minimising investment risk in CSF campaigns is a regulatory breach.

rules.name: no_unverified_health_claims
rules.description: Block therapeutic or health benefit claims about food that are not backed by evidence.
rules.rationale: TGA (Therapeutic Goods Administration) regulates health claims about food in Australia. Unverified therapeutic claims breach TGA guidelines.

rules.name: no_false_food_safety_claims
rules.description: Block food safety claims that go beyond what is verifiable.
rules.rationale: Food Standards Australia New Zealand (FSANZ) regulates food safety claims. Absolute safety claims are unverifiable and misleading.

rules.name: geographic_delivery_accuracy
rules.description: Block delivery area claims beyond current service coverage (Sydney, Central Coast, Wollongong).
rules.rationale: Must not overclaim delivery coverage. Farm Thru currently delivers to Sydney, Central Coast, and Wollongong only.

rules.name: no_greenwashing
rules.description: Block vague environmental claims that cannot be substantiated. 'Regenerative' is permitted as it is specific and verifiable. 'Carbon neutral' is blocked unless backed by certification.
rules.rationale: ACCC greenwashing guidelines require substantiated environmental claims. Vague green language without certification or evidence is misleading.

rules.name: vip_deposit_accuracy
rules.description: Block incorrect deposit or investment amounts. VIP deposit is $5, minimum investment is $50, maximum investment is $10,000.
rules.rationale: Financial accuracy is critical for CSF campaigns. Incorrect deposit or investment amounts breach ASIC disclosure requirements.

rules.name: no_supermarket_defamation
rules.description: Block direct defamation of named competitors without factual comparison. Factual comparisons like 'Coles adds 47 stops' are allowed — only defamatory language is blocked.
rules.rationale: Comparative advertising must be factual per ACL Section 18. Defamatory language about named competitors is a legal risk.

rules.name: refundable_deposit_disclaimer
rules.description: When mentioning the $5 deposit, must also mention it is refundable.
rules.rationale: Consumer protection — deposits must be clearly described as refundable to avoid misleading consumers.
